---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation.
title: "[DOCS]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Documentation Issue

Describe what is incorrect, missing, or confusing.

---

# Location

Specify where the issue exists.

Examples:

- README.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- API Documentation
- Wiki
- Website

---

# Suggested Improvement

Describe how the documentation could be improved.

---

# Additional Context

Include screenshots, links, or any other helpful information.
